uploadBookmarksDesc.message: Upload all the bookmarks of the local browser to the server

downloadBookmarksDesc.message: First clear the bookmarks in the local browser, and then download all the bookmarks on the server to the local browser

syncBookmarksDesc.message: Merge all the bookmarks on the server into the local browser, and then upload them to the server

removeAllBookmarksDesc.message: Remove All Bookmarks, Please backup first

autoSyncMissingConfig.message: Please fill in Token / Gist ID / File Name in settings first

autoSyncEnableDesc.message: Sync bookmarks between local and Gist on a schedule

autoSyncOnStartupDesc.message: Trigger a sync immediately when browser starts

autoSyncSaveError.message: Saved, but failed to notify background

lastSync.description: Popup sync time row label, e.g. 'Last Sync: 2026-06-22 06:45'

lastSyncNotYet.description: Shown when no sync has happened yet; styled red italic

lastSyncSourceAuto.description: Badge indicating the sync was triggered by the scheduled alarm (trigger source 01)

lastSyncSourceManual.description: Badge indicating the sync was triggered by clicking upload/download (trigger source 02)

viewGistTitle.message: View the synced bookmarks file on GitHub

githubTokenHelp.message: A Personal Access Token (classic) with the 'gist' scope is required.
githubTokenHelp.description: Hint shown below the GitHub Token field

getToken.description: Button to open GitHub token settings page

createNewGist.description: Link to open gist.github.com to create a new Gist

gistIDHelp.message: Paste only the ID portion from your Gist URL (e.g. for gist.github.com/<ID>, copy just the <ID> part, not the full URL).
gistIDHelp.description: Hint shown below the Gist ID field

aiOrganizeSection.description: Options page advanced features section title

aiOrganizeBackendUrl.description: Label for the backend service URL input in advanced features

aiOrganizeBackendUrlHelp.message: Enter the URL of your AI organize backend service. Self-hosted required.
aiOrganizeBackendUrlHelp.description: Help text shown below the backend URL input

aiOrganizeRunButton.description: Button that triggers the AI organize task

aiOrganizeRunningTitle.description: Title of the progress bar shown in the popup during the task

aiOrganizeProgressLabel.description: Progress text template: {current} done count, {total} total, {step} current step name

aiOrganizeModalTitle.description: Title of the modal shown after organize task succeeds

aiOrganizeModalSummary.description: Modal summary: {count} bookmark count, {cats} category count

aiOrganizeModalHint.message: Organized into the 「AI分类」 root folder in your Gist. Click "Download Bookmarks" in the popup to sync to your browser.
aiOrganizeModalHint.description: Hint at the bottom of the success modal

aiOrganizeFailed.description: Title of the modal shown when the organize task fails

aiOrganizeMissingConfig.message: Please configure Token / Gist ID / File Name first
aiOrganizeMissingConfig.description: Hint shown when the user hasn't filled in required config

aiOrganizeStartHint.message: ✅ Started. Results window will pop up automatically when done.
aiOrganizeStartHint.description: Hint shown on options page after clicking the organize button

aiOrganizeRunning.description: Label shown on the Organize button while a task is running
